title: Ethiopian Berbere Stew
description: A flavorful and spicy Ethiopian-inspired stew made with berbere spice blend and served with roasted cabbage.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add 1 onion, chopped, and cook until softened, 5 minutes.
Add 2 cloves of garlic, minced, and cook for 1 minute.
Add 2 cups of stew and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
Stir in 2 tablespoons of berbere and cook for 2 minutes.
Add shredded cabbage and cook until wilted.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped roasted and crunchy for added texture.
